title: I lost $120k trading signals 😭💸
thesis_bullets: In a couple of hours I lost 120k to trading strategies I just didn't understand.

I've been trading and dabbling in bots throughout the whole of the period of COVID, documenting every single win and loss on YouTube and consistently changing and tweaking my trading strategies and simply second guessing myself.
The loss has made one thing obvious, the problem was that I blindly followed these signals without understanding how they actually worked.
Here's one thing that traders just don't want to hear.
Signals are tempting because they promise, set it and forget it profits, but that is an illusion.
When markets move differently than expected, these systems tend to break and you end up losing money.
Don't get me wrong, the problem is not the strategy, it's the lack of transparency and the human control.
You blindly trust other people's signals that you don't understand and that invites mistakes, overconfidence and emotional trading and emotional reactions when things go wrong.
Once I figured this out I went all in on rules based systematic trading.
Every strategy I built, tested and ran was coded by me live and transparently.

hypotheses.statement: BTC continuation edge appears when signal alignment persists on 1h.
hypotheses.rationale: Research and indicator mentions converge on trend-continuation logic with confirmation filters.
hypotheses.falsifiable_test: Backtest BTC on 1h: require >=55% win rate and positive expectancy over 200+ trades; reject if unmet.

candidate_signals.name: alignment_entry
candidate_signals.description: Enter only when primary trend signal and confirmation filter agree on bar close.

strategy_heuristics_used: Every hypothesis should include explicit regime assumptions and invalidate conditions.
Separate signal logic from execution logic to reduce confounded performance attribution.
Require risk gating concepts before scaling complexity in entry or exit rules.
automation_heuristics_used: Keep human approval checkpoints for high-impact automation and deployment transitions.
Enforce deterministic session gating before any live-capable execution pathway is enabled.
Invest first in telemetry for risk, latency, and execution drift before adding new automation features.
